---
title: "450k_independent_validation"
author: "YC"
date: "2026-06-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## data preprocessing
## GSE42752
```{r GSE42752}
###############################################
## GSE42752 450k methylation processed matrix pipeline
## Goal:1.get standard beta value matrix
##      2.Build phenotype table pD
##      3. Run ChAMP filtering.
############################################################

############################################################
## Module 0. Clear environment and load required packages
############################################################
rm(list = ls())
options(timeout = 100000) 
options(scipen = 20)
options(stringsAsFactors = F)
require(GEOquery)
require(Biobase)
library("impute")
library(ChAMP)

############################################################
## Module 1. Read GEO metadata
#Ensure that the methylation beta matrix and the phenotype information strictly correspond to each other
## Download/read GEO series matrix metadata.
eset <- getGEO("GSE42752",destdir = './',AnnotGPL = T,getGPL = F)
beta.m <- exprs(eset[[1]])
class(beta.m)
dim(beta.m)
############################################################
## Module 2. Build phenotype table pD

## Build a clean phenotype table.
## Modify this part when applying the pipeline to another dataset
pD.all <- pData(eset[[1]])
pD <- pD.all[,c(37,2)]
names(pD) <- c("group", "ID")
pD$group <- ifelse(grepl("normal",pD$group,ignore.case = T),
  "Normal","Tumor")

#⭐Check if the extracted groupings are correct
check_df <- data.frame(Title = pD.all$`tissue:ch1`, Group = pD$group)
head(check_df, 10)
tail(check_df,10)
table(pD$group)


############################################################
## Module 3. Align pD with beta.m
############################################################

## Check whether beta.m and pD contain the same sample set.
## setequal() ignores order.
identical(rownames(pD),colnames(beta.m))##This must be TRUE before champ.filter().
setequal(colnames(beta.m), pD$ID)
# Confirm that there are no duplicated sample names
sum(duplicated(colnames(beta.m)))
sum(duplicated(pD$ID))

# Set pD row names as GSM IDs.
rownames(pD) <- pD$ID
## Final strict alignment check.
dim(beta.m)
dim(pD)

# Set group order
pD$group <- factor(
  pD$group,
  levels = c("Normal", "Tumor"))

# Sort pD by group
sample_order <- order(pD$group)

pD <- pD[sample_order, , drop = FALSE]

# Reorder beta matrix columns according to pD
beta.m <- beta.m[, rownames(pD), drop = FALSE]

############################################################
## Module 4. Run ChAMP filtering
############################################################

## Run ChAMP filtering using the cleaned beta matrix and aligned pD.
myLoad <- champ.filter(beta = beta.m, pd = pD, arraytype = "450k")
## Save the ChAMP object for downstream analysis.
saveRDS(myLoad, file = "step0.1-GSE42752_output.rds")
#myLoad <- readRDS("step0.1-GSE42752_output.rds")

# For all downstream analyses, simply use this myLoad variable
#champ.filter() performs initial quality control:
#(1).Filters out probes with low detection p-value.
#(2).Removes probes with missing values.
#(3).Filters sex chromosomes or SNP-associated probes if needed.
#(4).The output myLoad is an object used for all downstream ChAMP analyses 
##(normalization, DMP, DMR, pathway analysis).


```

## Independent validation of discovery hyper-DMRs in 450k datasets-GSE42752
```{r}
############################################################
## Independent validation of discovery hyper-DMRs in GSE42752
## Validation direction:
##   Tumor - Normal
############################################################

rm(list = ls())
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
options(scipen = 20)

############################################################
## 0. Load required packages
############################################################

library(data.table)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(IRanges)
library(minfi)
library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)

############################################################
## 1. Load discovery DMRs
############################################################

load("dmr_hyper_custom.Rdata")
dD <- as.data.frame(dmr_hyper_custom)

## Basic coordinate check
stopifnot(all(c("chr", "start", "end") %in% colnames(dD)))

## Add DMR ID
dD$DMR_ID <- paste0("DMR_", dD$region_id)

## Keep discovery delta beta
dD$discovery_deltaBeta <- dD$mean_deltaBeta

############################################################
## 2. Load GSE42752 filtered beta matrix and phenotype
############################################################

dataset_name <- "GSE42752"

myLoad <- readRDS("step0.1-GSE42752_output.rds")

beta_val <- myLoad$beta
pd_val <- myLoad$pd

############################################################
## 3. Check and align phenotype with beta matrix
############################################################
## Phenotype is already aligned with beta matrix
stopifnot(identical(colnames(beta_val), rownames(pd_val)))

## Standardize group variable
pd_val$group <- factor(
  as.character(pd_val$group),
  levels = c("Normal", "Tumor")
)

## Build group list
group_list <- pd_val$group
names(group_list) <- rownames(pd_val)

## Extract Normal and Tumor sample IDs
normal_samples <- names(group_list)[group_list == "Normal"]
tumor_samples  <- names(group_list)[group_list == "Tumor"]

## Check sample numbers
table(group_list)
############################################################
## 4. Standardize genomic coordinates
############################################################

fix_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("^chr", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x[x == "23"] <- "X"
  x[x == "24"] <- "Y"
  x[x %in% c("M", "MT")] <- "M"
  paste0("chr", x)
}

dD$chr <- fix_chr(dD$chr)
dD$start <- as.numeric(dD$start)
dD$end <- as.numeric(dD$end)

dD <- dD[
  !is.na(dD$chr) &
    !is.na(dD$start) &
    !is.na(dD$end),
]

dD <- dD[dD$chr %in% paste0("chr", 1:22), ]

############################################################
## 5. Load 450K annotation and map CpGs to genomic positions
############################################################

anno <- minfi::getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
anno <- as.data.frame(anno)
anno$CpG <- rownames(anno)

anno <- anno[anno$CpG %in% rownames(beta_val), ]

anno$chr <- fix_chr(anno$chr)
anno$pos <- as.numeric(anno$pos)

anno <- anno[
  !is.na(anno$chr) &
    !is.na(anno$pos) &
    anno$chr %in% paste0("chr", 1:22),
]

common_cpgs <- intersect(rownames(beta_val), anno$CpG)

beta_val <- beta_val[common_cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
anno <- anno[match(common_cpgs, anno$CpG), ]

stopifnot(identical(rownames(beta_val), anno$CpG))

############################################################
## 6. Convert CpGs and DMRs into GRanges objects
############################################################

cpg_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = anno$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = anno$pos, end = anno$pos),
  CpG = anno$CpG
)

dmr_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = dD$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = dD$start, end = dD$end),
  DMR_ID = dD$DMR_ID
)

############################################################
## 7. Identify CpGs located within each discovery DMR
############################################################

hits <- findOverlaps(dmr_gr, cpg_gr)

dmr_cpg_list <- split(
  mcols(cpg_gr)$CpG[subjectHits(hits)],
  queryHits(hits)
)

############################################################
## 8. Calculate DMR-level beta values and validation delta beta
############################################################

validation_results <- dD

validation_results$dataset <- dataset_name
validation_results$nCpG <- 0
validation_results$meanBeta_Normal <- NA_real_
validation_results$meanBeta_Tumor <- NA_real_
validation_results$deltaBeta_validation <- NA_real_
validation_results$p.value <- NA_real_

dmr_beta <- matrix(
  NA_real_,
  nrow = nrow(dD),
  ncol = ncol(beta_val),
  dimnames = list(dD$DMR_ID, colnames(beta_val))
)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(dD))) {
  
  cpgs <- dmr_cpg_list[[as.character(i)]]
  
  if (is.null(cpgs)) {
    next
  }
  
  cpgs <- unique(intersect(cpgs, rownames(beta_val)))
  
  validation_results$nCpG[i] <- length(cpgs)
  
  if (length(cpgs) < 1) {
    next
  }
  
  dmr_value <- colMeans(beta_val[cpgs, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  dmr_beta[i, ] <- dmr_value
  
  normal_value <- dmr_value[normal_samples]
  tumor_value  <- dmr_value[tumor_samples]
  
  validation_results$meanBeta_Normal[i] <- mean(normal_value, na.rm = TRUE)
  validation_results$meanBeta_Tumor[i] <- mean(tumor_value, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  validation_results$deltaBeta_validation[i] <-
    mean(tumor_value, na.rm = TRUE) - mean(normal_value, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  validation_results$p.value[i] <- tryCatch(
    wilcox.test(
      tumor_value,
      normal_value,
      alternative = "greater",
      exact = FALSE
    )$p.value,
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

############################################################
## 9. Define validation labels
############################################################
validation_results$FDR <- p.adjust(
  validation_results$p.value,
  method = "BH"
)

## Same direction: Tumor higher than Normal
validation_results$same_trend <- 
  validation_results$deltaBeta_validation > 0

## Direction + moderate effect
validation_results$same_trend_delta_0.10 <- 
  validation_results$deltaBeta_validation > 0.10

## Direction + strong effect, comparable to discovery threshold
validation_results$same_trend_delta_0.20 <- 
  validation_results$deltaBeta_validation > 0.20

## Direction + nominal significance
validation_results$validated_p005 <-
  validation_results$same_trend & 
  validation_results$p.value < 0.05

## Direction + FDR significance
validation_results$validated_FDR005 <- 
  validation_results$same_trend & 
  validation_results$FDR < 0.05

## Main validation criterion:
## CpG coverage > 5, validation delta beta > 0.2, and nominal p < 0.05
validation_results$validated_strict <-
  validation_results$nCpG > 5 &
  validation_results$deltaBeta_validation > 0.20 &
  validation_results$p.value < 0.05

## More stringent version using FDR
validation_results$validated_strict_FDR <-
  validation_results$nCpG > 5 &
  validation_results$deltaBeta_validation > 0.20 &
  validation_results$FDR < 0.05

############################################################
## 10. Summarize validation results
############################################################

summary_validation <- data.frame(
  dataset = dataset_name,
  
  Total_discovery_hyper_DMRs = nrow(validation_results),
  
  DMRs_with_CpG_overlap = sum(
    validation_results$nCpG > 0,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  DMRs_with_more_than_5_CpGs = sum(
    validation_results$nCpG > 5,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Same_trend_DMRs = sum(
    validation_results$same_trend,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Same_trend_percent_among_overlap = round(
    100 * mean(
      validation_results$same_trend[validation_results$nCpG > 0],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    2
  ),
  
  Same_trend_delta_0.10 = sum(
    validation_results$same_trend_delta_0.10,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Same_trend_delta_0.20 = sum(
    validation_results$same_trend_delta_0.20,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Validated_p005 = sum(
    validation_results$validated_p005,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Validated_FDR005 = sum(
    validation_results$validated_FDR005,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Validated_strict = sum(
    validation_results$validated_strict,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  
  Validated_strict_FDR = sum(
    validation_results$validated_strict_FDR,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

validated_hyper_dmrs <- validation_results[
  validation_results$validated_strict == TRUE,
]
############################################################
## 11. Save final outputs
############################################################
## Strict validated DMRs:
## nCpG > 5, validation delta beta > 0.20, and nominal p < 0.05
validated_hyper_dmrs <- validation_results[
  validation_results$validated_strict == TRUE,
]

## More stringent FDR-based validated DMRs:
## nCpG > 5, validation delta beta > 0.20, and FDR < 0.05
validated_hyper_dmrs_FDR <- validation_results[
  validation_results$validated_strict_FDR == TRUE,
]

write.csv(
  validation_results,
  file = paste0(dataset_name, "_validation_results_all_DMRs.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  summary_validation,
  file = paste0(dataset_name, "_validation_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  validated_hyper_dmrs,
  file = paste0(dataset_name, "_validated_hyper_DMRs_strict_p005.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  validated_hyper_dmrs_FDR,
  file = paste0(dataset_name, "_validated_hyper_DMRs_strict_FDR005.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  list(
    dD = dD,
    beta_val = beta_val,
    pd_val = pd_val,
    group_list = group_list,
    dmr_beta = dmr_beta,
    validation_results = validation_results,
    summary_validation = summary_validation,
    validated_hyper_dmrs = validated_hyper_dmrs,
    validated_hyper_dmrs_FDR = validated_hyper_dmrs_FDR
  ),
  file = paste0("step1-", dataset_name, "-validation-output.rds")
)

print(summary_validation)
############################################################
## 12. Plot validation summary
############################################################

library(ggplot2)

validation_count_df <- data.frame(
  Criterion = c(
    "Discovery hyper-DMRs",
    "CpG overlap",
    "nCpG > 5",
    "Same direction",
    "Δβ > 0.10",
    "Δβ > 0.20",
    "Direction + P < 0.05",
    "Direction + FDR < 0.05",
    "Strict P < 0.05",
    "Strict FDR < 0.05"
  ),
  Count = c(
    summary_validation$Total_discovery_hyper_DMRs,
    summary_validation$DMRs_with_CpG_overlap,
    summary_validation$DMRs_with_more_than_5_CpGs,
    summary_validation$Same_trend_DMRs,
    summary_validation$Same_trend_delta_0.10,
    summary_validation$Same_trend_delta_0.20,
    summary_validation$Validated_p005,
    summary_validation$Validated_FDR005,
    summary_validation$Validated_strict,
    summary_validation$Validated_strict_FDR
  )
)

validation_count_df$Percent <- round(
  100 * validation_count_df$Count /
    summary_validation$Total_discovery_hyper_DMRs,
  2
)

validation_count_df$Label <- paste0(
  validation_count_df$Count,
  " (",
  validation_count_df$Percent,
  "%)"
)

validation_count_df$Criterion <- factor(
  validation_count_df$Criterion,
  levels = rev(validation_count_df$Criterion)
)

p <- ggplot(validation_count_df, aes(x = Criterion, y = Count)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70", color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Label), hjust = -0.05, size = 3.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  ylim(0, max(validation_count_df$Count) * 1.18) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = paste0(dataset_name, " independent validation summary"),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of DMRs"
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  paste0(dataset_name, "_validation_summary_barplot.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 9,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```


## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
